creator: cedric.gross@cnv.fr
text:
Sanitize_Bios_Geom check for cylindre/head/sector with old values and use cylindre up to 65535 anyway.

Fix: Adjust condition as for PC98, see also PR bin/113682 to adjust sysinstall


Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: Use HDD larger than 32Gb
